# Reference
## User
<details><summary><code>client.user.<a href="src/fern/user/client.py">whoami</a>()</code></summary>
<dl>
<dd>

#### 🔌 Usage

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

```python
from fern import FernApi

client = FernApi(
    username="YOUR_USERNAME",
    password="YOUR_PASSWORD",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.user.whoami()

```
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>
